channel.title: About on Marzena Karpinska
channel.description: Recent content in About on Marzena Karpinska

item.title: Publications
item.description: You can also find my articles on my Google Scholar profile. Total: 17 In English（英語） book-open github “FABLES: Evaluating faithfulness and content selection in book-length summarization” Yekyung Kim, Yapei Chang, Marzena Karpinska, Aparna Garimella, Varun Manjunatha, Kyle Lo, Tanya Goyal, Mohit Iyyer (2024). [Preprint] book-open globe “Aurora-M: The First Open Source Multilingual Language Model Red-teamed according to the U.S. Executive Order” Taishi Nakamura, Mayank Mishra, Simone Tedeschi, Yekun Chai, Jason T Stillerman, Felix Friedrich, Prateek Yadav, Tanmay Laud, …, Marzena Karpinska, …, Sampo Pyysalo (2024).
